---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new template, reference doc, archetype, or workflow refinement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this solves

What's missing or awkward today? Be concrete — "the builder over-spawns agents for X" beats "the builder could be smarter."

## Proposed solution

What would you add / change? Sketch the shape:

- New file? <path>
- Modification? <which existing file>
- New flow step? <where it slots in>

## Scope check

- [ ] Does this fit within scope per `CONTRIBUTING.md` § "Scope"?
- [ ] Is it generic enough to benefit most users (not just your specific domain)?
- [ ] Have you checked whether existing references already cover this?

## Worked example

If the feature is a new template / archetype / reference, sketch what a generated project using it would look like. A 10-line example is worth more than a paragraph of explanation.

## Alternatives considered

What other shapes did you consider? Why is the proposal better than those?

## Additional context

Links to similar patterns in other projects, relevant Anthropic guidance, prior art, etc.
